description: Selected text in a Compose-hosted document. Input contract for playbook actions that operate on a user-selected span (e.g., Explain clause, Replace with standard, Compare-to-playbook, Draft alternative). All AI actions in Compose operating on a selection consume this scope.

fields.name: selectionText
fields.description: The exact text the user has selected in the Compose editor. UTF-8 plain text extracted from TipTap; rich-formatting metadata is stripped before sending. Bounded to 16,000 characters at the BFF input filter (CHAT-ATTACHMENT-POLICY total-text cap class). Empty selection = the playbook action is invalid; surface a validation error pre-dispatch.

fields.name: selectionAnchorStart
fields.description: Zero-based character offset of the selection start within the TipTap document. Used by R2 annotation re-anchoring on return-from-Word. Stable within a single editing session; meaningless across sessions unless paired with a document version etag.

fields.name: selectionAnchorEnd
fields.description: Zero-based character offset of the selection end (exclusive). MUST satisfy selectionAnchorEnd > selectionAnchorStart.

fields.name: documentSpeId
fields.description: SharePoint Embedded drive-item id of the open document. The session<>document binding key. Always present (Compose binding rule: every document is in SPE).

fields.name: documentVersionEtag
fields.description: SPE driveItem etag at the moment of selection. Lets the playbook detect that the document changed mid-flight and reject stale-selection invocations. Optional; if absent the playbook proceeds without staleness verification.

fields.name: documentRecordId
fields.description: sprk_document GUID when the document has been promoted (post-first-Save). Null for ephemeral pre-Save docs (Path B). When present, enables matter-binding lookups + audit trail joins.

fields.name: matterId
fields.description: sprk_matter GUID when the document is matter-bound. Null when the document is unbound or pre-Save. When present, enables matter-scoped knowledge retrieval (precedent, prior negotiations, matter playbook entries).

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: ChatSession id (Redis/Cosmos/Dataverse three-tier persistence key). Lets the playbook write annotations / derived insights back to session memory for the R2 'return-from-Word re-anchoring' workflow.

fields.name: tenantId
fields.description: Azure AD tenant GUID. ADR-015 Tier 3 isolation key; inherited from PlaybookInvocationContext.TenantId.

inputs.rationale: 16K selection + ~500 chars for identifiers + etag stays well under the chat-text caps (CHAT-ATTACHMENT-POLICY) and within the typical playbook prompt budget.

outputs.expected: Playbook-shape: terminal-node text + structured fields per the invoked action's JPS output schema. This scope does not constrain output — the action defines its own output fields. The session-memory write contract (writing back to ChatSession annotations) is the action's responsibility per the playbook node configJson.

metadata.author: spaarkeai-compose-r1 spike-4
metadata.consumedBy: R2 actions (Explain clause, Replace with standard, Compare-to-playbook, Draft alternative). R1 does NOT ship any action consuming this scope — schema is locked for R2 to consume without retrofit.
